header: One dropdown in page properties. A whole new website.
subheadline: The per-page theme preset overrides the site default and inherits down the rootline — campaign sections, sub-brands, and microsites each get their own look from a single TYPO3 install. Every chapter of this styleguide proves it.

hero_image.title: Per-page theme preset field
hero_image.alternative: TYPO3 page properties showing the Desiderio per-page theme preset selector.
hero_image.description: Screenshot of the TYPO3 backend with Desiderio installed.
